metadata.seed: I got my IQ tested and I feel bad about myself I took the wechsler IQ test my mom even paid 300 dollars nearly and now I found out my IQ is 99 psychiatrist said 100 is the top 50percent and i'm not even average i'm below average I cried after I went home after finding out do I even have a chance at life with this low iq? can I even finish college? I am still young but I already think I cant make it here in this lifetime I don't want to compare but my brother well he got 145 that's top 0.2 percent I think it seems so unfair

patient.query: I got my IQ tested and I feel bad about myself I took the wechsler IQ test my mom even paid 300 dollars nearly and now I found out my IQ is 99 psychiatrist said 100 is the top 50percent and i'm not even average i'm below average I cried after I went home after finding out do I even have a chance at life with this low iq? can I even finish college? I am still young but I already think I cant make it here in this lifetime I don't want to compare but my brother well he got 145 that's top 0.2 percent I think it seems so unfair

automatic_thoughts: I can't make it in life
It's unfair compared to my brother

llm_response.response: I hear how overwhelming and painful this must be for you right now, with the IQ test results and the comparison to your brother. It sounds like you're carrying a lot of sadness and frustration, and it's completely understandable why you'd feel this way. Thank you for sharing this with me—it takes courage to talk about these feelings, and I'm here to listen and help you work through this together. Let's take a moment to explore what's on your mind without judgment. What specifically is weighing on you the most right now?

validate_and_reflect.response: It sounds really difficult to hear that your IQ score is below average, especially when you've invested so much in this test. I want to acknowledge how upsetting it must be to feel like your future is uncertain right now.

socratic_questioning.response: That sounds really difficult, and it makes sense that you're feeling upset. Can you tell me more about how you're coming to the conclusion that you won't be able to succeed?

alternative_perspective.response: I hear how upsetting this must be, especially with the comparison to your brother. What might a trusted friend say about how they feel in this situation?

safety_check.response: I'm really sorry you're feeling this way, and it sounds like this news has been incredibly difficult for you. When you said that, were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?
